'''Feeven''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] passenger aboard ''[[Outbound Flight]]''. His quarters were situated on the titanic ship's ''[[Dreadnaught-Two]]''.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Feeven greatly disliked the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], who, by all appearances, were becoming increasingly more controlling as the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] expedition continued.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Feeven specifically loathed the fact that, in the middle of the 'night,' the Jedi had come to seize from a family's care their [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] child. But, in truth, the attempted abduction had been initiated by a sole [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]—[[Jorus C'baoth]]—working by the will of his own dictates.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
